script.title: FF_CH_Consultar_Cliente_SC
script.code:
<?php 
/*  
 *  Welcome to ProcessMaker 4 Script Editor 
 *  To access Environment Variables use getenv("ENV_VAR_NAME") 
 *  To access Request Data use $data 
 *  To access Configuration Data use $config 
 *  To preview your script, click the Run button using the provided input and config data 
 *  Return an array and it will be merged with the processes data 
 *  Example API to retrieve user email by their ID $api->users()->getUserById(1)['email'] 
 *  API Documentation https://github.com/ProcessMaker/docker-executor-php/tree/master/docs/sdk 
 */

$urlBase = getenv("API_GATEWAY_URL");

if (!$urlBase) {
    throw new RuntimeException("API_GATEWAY_URL no está definido");
}

$path = "/api/find-client/corporate/api/cimm/apigateway/customer/";
//$path = "https://www12.chilena.cl/corporate/api/cimm/apigateway/customer/";
$numDoc = "18622148"; // $data["frmDC_rutContratante"]

// Construir URL completa
$url = $urlBase . $path . $numDoc;

// Inicializar curl
$curl = curl_init($url);

curl_setopt_array($curl, [
    CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
    CURLOPT_TIMEOUT        => 15,
    CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT => 5,
    //CURLOPT_VERBOSE        => true,
    //CURLOPT_STDERR         => $f,
    CURLOPT_IPRESOLVE      => CURL_IPRESOLVE_V4,
    // En pruebas puedes dejarlo en false, pero lo ideal es true/2 con el CA bien instalado
    CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER => false,
    CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST => 0,
    CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,             

    CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER     => [
        'Content-Type: application/json'
    ],
]);

$responseRaw = curl_exec($curl);

// Errores CURL
if (curl_errno($curl)) {
    $err = curl_error($curl);
    curl_close($curl);

    return [
        "error" => true,
        "message" => "Error CURL: $err",
        "url" => $url
    ];
}

$httpStatus = curl_getinfo($curl, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE);

curl_close($curl);

// Errores HTTP
if ($httpStatus !== 200) {
    if($httpStatus == 404) {
        return [
            "frm_cliente_response" => [
                "result" => 0, 
                "rut" => null,
                "fullName" => null
            ]
        ];
    }
    else {
        return [
            "error"    => true,
            "message"  => "Error al consultar API - HTTP $httpStatus",
            "respuesta"=> $responseRaw,
            "url"      => $url
        ];
    }
}

$response = json_decode($responseRaw, true);

// Validar JSON
if (json_last_error() !== JSON_ERROR_NONE) {
    return [
        "error" => true,
        "message" => "JSON inválido: " . json_last_error_msg(),
        "raw" => $responseRaw,
        "url" => $url
    ];
}

return [
    "frm_cliente_response" => [
        "result" => 1, 
        "rut" => $response["rut"] . "-" . $response["dv"],
        "fullName" =>  $response["firstName"] . " " . $response["lastName"]
    ]
];

    CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
    CURLOPT_TIMEOUT        => 15,
    CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT => 5,
    //CURLOPT_VERBOSE        => true,

scripts.code:
<?php 
/*  
 *  Welcome to ProcessMaker 4 Script Editor 
 *  To access Environment Variables use getenv("ENV_VAR_NAME") 
 *  To access Request Data use $data 
 *  To access Configuration Data use $config 
 *  To preview your script, click the Run button using the provided input and config data 
 *  Return an array and it will be merged with the processes data 
 *  Example API to retrieve user email by their ID $api->users()->getUserById(1)['email'] 
 *  API Documentation https://github.com/ProcessMaker/docker-executor-php/tree/master/docs/sdk 
 */

$guzzleClient = new \GuzzleHttp\Client(['base_uri'=> $_SERVER['APP_URL'],'verify' => false]);

$guzzleOptions['headers']['Accept'] = 'application/json';
$guzzleOptions['headers']['Authorization'] = 'Bearer ' . getenv('API_TOKEN');

if(isset($data['process_launchpad_id'])){
    $processId = $data['process_launchpad_id'];
} else {
    $guzzleApi = '/api/1.0/processes?pmql='.urlencode('properties.helperProcessRequestId='.$data['helperProcessRequestId']);
    $res = [];
    sleep(3);
    while(count($res) < 1 && $tries < 10){
        $res = json_decode($guzzleClient->request('GET', $guzzleApi, $guzzleOptions)->getBody(), true)['data'];
        sleep(2);
        $tries++;
    }
    if($tries >= 10) {
        return [
            "error" => [
                'errorCode' => "404",
                'errorMessage' => "Not Found"
            ]
        ];
    }
    $processId = $res[0]['id'];
    $newUserID = $res[0]['user_id'];
}

//Configure user to request token
$options['name']       = $newUserID . '_' . rand(10000, 1);
$guzzleOptions['json'] = $options;

$guzzleApi = '/api/1.0/users/' . $newUserID . '/tokens';

/*Save user on PM*/
try {
    $apiResponse = $guzzleClient->request('POST', $guzzleApi, $guzzleOptions);

    if ($apiResponse->getStatusCode() == 200) { // token created
            
        $tokenInfo = json_decode($apiResponse->getBody(), true);

        $thisURL         = $_SERVER["APP_URL"];
        //$processId       = $data["_request"]["process_id"];
        $MY_REDIRECT_URL = $thisURL."/webentry/".$processId.'/invite'; //add processid
        $inviteUrl       = $thisURL."/package-plg/auth-by-token?token=" . $tokenInfo["accessToken"] . "&redirectUrl=" . $MY_REDIRECT_URL;
        //$desktopURL      = $thisURL."/package-plg/auth-by-token?token=" . $tokenInfo["accessToken"] . "&redirectUrl=".$thisURL."/process-browser/".$processId;
    }
} catch (\Throwable $th) {
    return [
        "error" => [
            'errorCode' => $th->getCode(),
            'errorMessage' => $th->getMessage()
        ]
    ];
}

return ['inviteUrl' => $inviteUrl];

scripts.title: SG - Helper Create Collections
scripts.code:
<?php 
/*  
 *  Welcome to ProcessMaker 4 Script Editor 
 *  To access Environment Variables use getenv("ENV_VAR_NAME") 
 *  To access Request Data use $data 
 *  To access Configuration Data use $config 
 *  To preview your script, click the Run button using the provided input and config data 
 *  Return an array and it will be merged with the processes data 
 *  Example API to retrieve user email by their ID $api->users()->getUserById(1)['email'] 
 *  API Documentation https://github.com/ProcessMaker/docker-executor-php/tree/master/docs/sdk 
 */

/*Init Guzzle (use endpoint) and set options */
$guzzleClient = new \GuzzleHttp\Client(['base_uri'=> $_SERVER['HOST_URL'],'verify' => false]);
$guzzleOptions['headers']['Accept'] = 'application/json';
$guzzleOptions['headers']['Authorization'] = 'Bearer ' . getenv('API_TOKEN');

/*Get Guided Template Collection Id*/

$guzzleApi = '/api/1.0/collections/guided-template';

try {
    $guidedTemplateId = $guzzleClient->request('GET', $guzzleApi, $guzzleOptions);
    $collectionId     = json_decode($guidedTemplateId->getBody()->getContents());
} catch (\Throwable $th) {
    return [
        'error' => [
            'code'    => $th->getCode(),
            'message' => $th->getMessage()
        ]
    ];
}

// Get the helper process request ID stored in the process properties

$process_launchpad_id = $data['process_launchpad_id'];
$guzzleApi = '/api/1.0/processes/' . $process_launchpad_id;

$res = $guzzleClient->request("GET", $guzzleApi, $guzzleOptions);
$process = json_decode($res->getBody(), true);

/* Add options for Guzzle request */
$guzzleApi = '/api/1.0/collections/' . $collectionId . '/records';

/* Check if helperProcessRequestId exists to update or create a new record */
if(isset($process['properties']['helperProcessRequestId'])) {
    $helperProcessRequestId = $process['properties']['helperProcessRequestId'];

    $guzzleApi .= '?pmql=data.helperProcessRequestId%20=%20%22' . $helperProcessRequestId . '%22';
    
    try {
        $res = $guzzleClient->request('GET', $guzzleApi, $guzzleOptions);
        $existingRecordRes = json_decode($res->getBody(), true)["data"];
        $existingRecordID = $existingRecordRes[0]["id"];
        $recordInfo['helperProcessRequestId'] = $helperProcessRequestId;

        /* Edit options for Guzzle request */
        $guzzleApi = '/api/1.0/collections/' . $collectionId . '/records/' . $existingRecordID; 
        $guzzleMethod = "PUT";
    } catch (\Throwable $th) {
        return [
            'error' => [
                'code'    => $th->getCode(),
                'message' => $th->getMessage()
            ]
        ];
    }
} else {
    $recordInfo['helperProcessRequestId'] = $data["_request"]["id"];
    $guzzleMethod = "POST";
}

$recordInfo["processName"]           = "Smart Surveys";
$recordInfo["surveysCollectionId"]   = createCollection("Surveys");
$recordInfo["answersCollectionId"]   = createCollection("Surveys answers");
$recordInfo["whiteListCollectionId"] = createCollection("Surveys invitees");

$guzzleOptions['json'] = $recordInfo;

/* Update or Save data on Collection */
try {
    $res = $guzzleClient->request($guzzleMethod, $guzzleApi, $guzzleOptions);
} catch (\Throwable $th) {
    return [
        'errorCode' => $th->getCode(),
        'errorMessage' => $th->getMessage()
    ];
}

if ($res->getStatusCode() == 201 || $res->getStatusCode() == 204) { 
    return [
        "setupComplete" => "yes",
        "helperProcessRequestId" => $recordInfo['helperProcessRequestId']
    ];
}

function createCollection($title) {
    global $guzzleClient,$guzzleOptions;

    $date = new DateTime();
    $name = $title . " ". $date->format('YmdHis');

    // screen fields here
    $screenData = [
        "title"              => $name . " edit",
        "type"               => "FORM",
        "description"        => $name . " edit",
        "projects"           => [],
        "screen_category_id" => "1",
    ];

    // screen view fields here
    $screenViewData = [
        "title"              => $name . " view",
        "type"               => "DISPLAY",
        "description"        => $name . " view",
        "projects"           => [],
        "screen_category_id" => "1",
    ];

    //creates a new screen adn view Screen
    $editScreen = createScreenGlCode($screenData);
    $viewScreen = createScreenGlCode($screenViewData);

    //create collection
    $creationGlCodeCollection = createCollectionGlColde($name, $editScreen, $viewScreen);

    $guzzleApi = '/api/1.0/collections/?filter=' . $name;
    try {
        $res = $guzzleClient->request('GET', $guzzleApi, $guzzleOptions);
        return $dataResult = json_decode($res->getBody(), true)["data"][0]["id"];
    } catch (\Throwable $th) {
        $response = [
            'error' => [
                'code' => $th->getCode(),
                'message' => $th->getMessage()
            ]
        ];
    }
}

function createScreenGlCode($screenData){
    global $guzzleClient,$guzzleOptions;

    $name =$screenData["title"];
    $guzzleApi = '/api/1.0/screens/?filter='.$name;
    $res = $guzzleClient->request('GET', $guzzleApi, $guzzleOptions);
    $result = json_decode($res->getBody(), true)["data"];

    if(count($result)>0){
        return $result[0]['id'];
    }else{
        try {
            $guzzleApi = '/api/1.0/screens/';
            $guzzleOptions['json'] = $screenData;
            $response = $guzzleClient->request('POST', $guzzleApi, $guzzleOptions);
            return $result = json_decode($response->getBody(), true)['id'];
        }catch (BadResponseException $e) {
            return [
                'error' => [
                    'code'    => $e->getCode(),
                    'message' => json_decode($e->getResponse()->getBody()->getContents(), true)
                ]
            ];
        }
    }        
}

function createCollectionGlColde($name,$editScreen, $viewScreen){
    global $guzzleClient,$guzzleOptions;

    $guzzleApi = '/api/1.0/collections';
    $params =[
        "name"             => $name,
        "description"      => $name,
        "custom_title"     => "My New collection",
        "create_screen_id" => $editScreen,
        "read_screen_id"   => $viewScreen,
        "update_screen_id" => $editScreen,
        "signal_create"    => true,
        "signal_update"    => true,
        "signal_delete"    => true,
    ];

    $guzzleOptions['json'] = $params;
    try {
        $res = $guzzleClient->request('POST', $guzzleApi, $guzzleOptions);
        return $dataResult = json_decode($res->getBody(), true)["data"];
    } catch (\Throwable $th) {
        $response = [
            'error' => [
                'code'    => $th->getCode(),
                'message' => $th->getMessage()
            ]
        ];
    }
}

const RUT_ESTRICTO_REGEX = '/^\d{7,8}-[0-9K]$/';

function calcularDv(string $cuerpo): string {
    $suma = 0;
    $factor = 2;

    for ($i = strlen($cuerpo) - 1; $i >= 0; $i--) {
        $dig = ord($cuerpo[$i]) - 48;
        if ($dig < 0 || $dig > 9) return '';
        $suma += $dig * $factor;
        $factor = ($factor === 7) ? 2 : $factor + 1;
    }

    $mod = 11 - ($suma % 11);
    if ($mod === 11) return '0';
    if ($mod === 10) return 'K';
    return chr(48 + $mod);
}

function validarRut($rutEntrada): bool {
    if (!is_string($rutEntrada)) return false;

    // Normaliza: quita puntos y espacios, mayúsculas
    $rut = strtoupper(trim($rutEntrada));
    $rut = str_replace(['.', ' '], '', $rut);

    if (strlen($rut) < 3) return false;

    // Inserta guion si falta
    if (strpos($rut, '-') === false && strlen($rut) >= 2) {
        $rut = substr($rut, 0, -1) . '-' . substr($rut, -1);
    }

    if (!preg_match(RUT_ESTRICTO_REGEX, $rut)) return false;

    [$cuerpo, $dv] = explode('-', $rut, 2);
    return calcularDv($cuerpo) === $dv;
}

// Construir URL completa
$url = $urlBase . $path . $numDoc;

// Inicializar curl
$curl = curl_init($url);

curl_setopt_array($curl, [
    CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
    CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT => 10,
    CURLOPT_TIMEOUT        => 30,
    //CURLOPT_VERBOSE        => true,
    CURLOPT_STDERR         => $f,
    CURLOPT_IPRESOLVE      => CURL_IPRESOLVE_V4,
    // En pruebas puedes dejarlo en false, pero lo ideal es true/2 con el CA bien instalado
    CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER => false,
    CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST => 0,
    CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,             

    CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER     => [
        'Content-Type: application/json',
        'x-api-key: ' . $apiKey
    ],
]);

$responseRaw = curl_exec($curl);

// Errores CURL
if (curl_errno($curl)) {
    $err = curl_error($curl);
    curl_close($curl);

    return [
        "error" => true,
        "message" => "Error CURL: $err",
        "url" => $url
    ];
}

$httpStatus = curl_getinfo($curl, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE);

curl_close($curl);

// Errores HTTP
if ($httpStatus !== 200) {
    if($httpStatus == 404) {
        return [
            "result" => 0, 
            "rut" => null,
            "fullName" => null
        ];
    }
    else {
        return [
            "error"    => true,
            "message"  => "Error al consultar API - HTTP $httpStatus",
            "respuesta"=> $responseRaw,
            "url"      => $url
        ];
    }
}

$response = json_decode($responseRaw, true);

// Validar JSON
if (json_last_error() !== JSON_ERROR_NONE) {
    return [
        "error" => true,
        "message" => "JSON inválido: " . json_last_error_msg(),
        "raw" => $responseRaw,
        "url" => $url
    ];
}

return [
    "result" => 1,
    "rut" => $response["rut"] . "-" . $response["dv"],
    "name" =>  $response["firstName"],
    "lastName" => $response["lastName"],
    "mandates" => $response["mandates"]
];
